14	func (noopTransport) Query(context.Context, string, map[string]any, any) error {
15		return nil
16	}
17	
18	func TestAxonClient_SchemaBindingsCompile(t *testing.T) {
19		t.Parallel()
20	
21		client := NewClient(noopTransport{})
22		_, err := client.GetBead(context.Background(), "ddx-00000001")
23		require.NoError(t, err)
24	
25		local := bead.Bead{
26			ID:          "ddx-00000001",
27			Title:       "scaffold",
28			Status:      bead.StatusOpen,
29			Priority:    bead.DefaultPriority,
30			IssueType:   bead.DefaultType,
31			Owner:       "owner",
32			CreatedAt:   time.Unix(10, 0).UTC(),
33			CreatedBy:   "creator",
34			UpdatedAt:   time.Unix(20, 0).UTC(),
35			Labels:      []string{"kind:feature"},
36			Parent:      "ddx-00000002",
37			Description: "local model",
38			Acceptance:  "AC",
39			Notes:       "notes",
40			Dependencies: []bead.Dependency{{
41				IssueID:     "ddx-00000001",
42				DependsOnID: "ddx-00000002",
43				Type:        "blocks",
44				CreatedAt:   "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z",
45				CreatedBy:   "creator",
46				Metadata:    "meta",
47			}},
48			Extra: map[string]any{"source": "test"},
49		}
50	
51		remote := BeadFromLocal(local)
52		require.Equal(t, local.ID, remote.ID)
53		require.Equal(t, local.Title, remote.Title)
54		require.Equal(t, local.Status, remote.Status)
55		require.Equal(t, local.Priority, remote.Priority)
56		require.Equal(t, local.IssueType, remote.IssueType)
57		require.Equal(t, local.Owner, remote.Owner)
58		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedAt, remote.CreatedAt)
59		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedBy, remote.CreatedBy)
60		require.Equal(t, local.UpdatedAt, remote.UpdatedAt)
61		require.Equal(t, local.Labels, remote.Labels)
62		require.Equal(t, local.Parent, remote.Parent)
63		require.Equal(t, local.Description, remote.Description)
64		require.Equal(t, local.Acceptance, remote.Acceptance)
65		require.Equal(t, local.Notes, remote.Notes)
66		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, remote.Extra)
67		require.Len(t, remote.Dependencies, 1)
68		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].IssueID, remote.Dependencies[0].IssueID)
69		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID, remote.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID)
70		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Type, remote.Dependencies[0].Type)
71		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt)
72		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy)
73		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Metadata, remote.Dependencies[0].Metadata)
74	
75		back := remote.ToLocal()
76		require.Equal(t, local, back)
77	
78		input := BeadInputFromLocal(local)
79		require.Equal(t, local.ID, input.ID)
80		require.Equal(t, local.Title, input.Title)
81		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, input.Extra)
82		require.Len(t, input.Dependencies, 1)
83	
84		lifecycle := bead.LifecycleEvent{
85			EventID:   "evt-1",
86			BeadID:    local.ID,
87			Kind:      "created",
88			Summary:   "created",
89			Body:      "body",
90			Actor:     "actor",
91			Timestamp: time.Unix(30, 0).UTC(),
92		}
93		change := ChangeEventFromLifecycle(lifecycle)
94		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.EventID, change.EventID)
95		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.BeadID, change.BeadID)
96		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.Kind, change.Kind)
97		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.Summary, change.Summary)
98		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.Body, change.Body)
99		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.Actor, change.Actor)
100		require.Equal(t, lifecycle.Timestamp, change.Timestamp)
101		require.Equal(t, lifecycle, change.ToLifecycleEvent())
102	
103		_, err = client.ListBeads(context.Background())
104		require.NoError(t, err)
105	
106		_, err = client.CreateBead(context.Background(), input)
107		require.NoError(t, err)
108	
109		_, err = client.UpdateBead(context.Background(), local.ID, 7, input)
110		require.NoError(t, err)
111	}

31			Owner:       "owner",
32			CreatedAt:   time.Unix(10, 0).UTC(),
33			CreatedBy:   "creator",
34			UpdatedAt:   time.Unix(20, 0).UTC(),
35			Labels:      []string{"kind:feature"},
36			Parent:      "ddx-00000002",
37			Description: "local model",
38			Acceptance:  "AC",
39			Notes:       "notes",
40			Dependencies: []bead.Dependency{{
41				IssueID:     "ddx-00000001",
42				DependsOnID: "ddx-00000002",
43				Type:        "blocks",
44				CreatedAt:   "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z",
45				CreatedBy:   "creator",
46				Metadata:    "meta",
47			}},
48			Extra: map[string]any{"source": "test"},
49		}
50	
51		remote := BeadFromLocal(local)
52		require.Equal(t, local.ID, remote.ID)
53		require.Equal(t, local.Title, remote.Title)
54		require.Equal(t, local.Status, remote.Status)
55		require.Equal(t, local.Priority, remote.Priority)
56		require.Equal(t, local.IssueType, remote.IssueType)
57		require.Equal(t, local.Owner, remote.Owner)
58		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedAt, remote.CreatedAt)
59		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedBy, remote.CreatedBy)
60		require.Equal(t, local.UpdatedAt, remote.UpdatedAt)
61		require.Equal(t, local.Labels, remote.Labels)
62		require.Equal(t, local.Parent, remote.Parent)
63		require.Equal(t, local.Description, remote.Description)
64		require.Equal(t, local.Acceptance, remote.Acceptance)
65		require.Equal(t, local.Notes, remote.Notes)
66		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, remote.Extra)
67		require.Len(t, remote.Dependencies, 1)
68		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].IssueID, remote.Dependencies[0].IssueID)
69		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID, remote.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID)
70		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Type, remote.Dependencies[0].Type)
71		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt)
72		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy)
73		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Metadata, remote.Dependencies[0].Metadata)
74	
75		back := remote.ToLocal()
76		require.Equal(t, local, back)
77	
78		input := BeadInputFromLocal(local)
79		require.Equal(t, local.ID, input.ID)
80		require.Equal(t, local.Title, input.Title)
81		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, input.Extra)
82		require.Len(t, input.Dependencies, 1)
83	
84		_, err = client.ListBeads(context.Background())
85		require.NoError(t, err)
86	
87		_, err = client.CreateBead(context.Background(), input)
88		require.NoError(t, err)
89	
90		_, err = client.UpdateBead(context.Background(), local.ID, 7, input)
91		require.NoError(t, err)
92	}
93

input.content:
# ddx-8bc79046 — subscription cluster decisions

Run-id: 20260516T060933-666df52d
Bead: checks: residual production-reachability — internal/bead/axon subscription
Source: .ddx/executions/20260515T210515-1a20052a/production-reachability-final.json

## Verdict

DELETE every symbol listed for `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription.go`. The
Axon GraphQL `Client` is never instantiated in production: the only callers
are `cli/internal/bead/axon/*_test.go`. `cli/internal/bead/migrate.go` uses
`NewAxonBackend` from `cli/internal/bead`, which is an unrelated local-store
backend, not the GraphQL client. The websocket subscription path is a
scaffold from May 2026 with no production wiring path open today.

## Per-symbol decisions

| Position | Symbol | Decision |
|---|---|---|
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:33 | `ChangeEventFromLifecycle` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:47 | `ChangeEvent.ToLifecycleEvent` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:73 | `DualTransport.Query` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:81 | `DualTransport.Subscribe` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:98 | `NewWebSocketSubscriptionTransport` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:103 | `WebSocketSubscriptionTransport.Query` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:109 | `WebSocketSubscriptionTransport.Subscribe` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:232 | `normalizeWebSocketURL` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:243 | `cloneHeader` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:254 | `cloneDialer` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:263 | `mustJSON` | DELETE |
| internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:275 | `Client.SubscribeChangeEvents` | DELETE |

## Files removed

- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription.go` (entire file — every symbol above
  lived here).
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription_test.go` (exercised only the deleted
  websocket transport / SubscribeChangeEvents path).
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription_smoke_test.go` (smoke test for the
  deleted subscription transport).

## Files edited

- `cli/internal/bead/axon/client_test.go`: removed the `lifecycle` /
  `ChangeEventFromLifecycle` / `ToLifecycleEvent` assertions; the rest of
  the schema-binding test (Bead/BeadInput conversion, query/mutation
  scaffolds in `generated.go`) is unchanged.

## Out of scope (not touched)

- `cli/internal/bead/axon/queries/change_events.graphql` and the `ChangeEvent`
  type in `schema.graphql` are GraphQL artifacts, not Go symbols. The
  deadcode RTA does not flag them and they are out of this bead's scope
  (Go production-reachability only).
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/generated.go` Client/Bead/BeadInput surface is
  still scaffolded but is **outside the listed subscription cluster**; the
  bead's NON-SCOPE explicitly defers other clusters to separate beads.

No `// wiring:pending` annotations were left behind; every listed symbol is
gone, so AC 3 is satisfied vacuously.
